label: phone number
definition: A primary telephone number used to contact the individual.

label: email address
definition: An electronic mail identifier used for communication with the subject.

label: LinkedIn profile URL
definition: A web address pointing to the subject's professional profile on LinkedIn, used to access their online resume and professional information.

label: GitHub profile URL
definition: A hyperlink pointing to the subject's public profile on the GitHub platform, used to access their software development activity and contributions.

label: professional role
definition: The professional role denotes the individual's current or most significant position in their career, typically reflecting their primary occupational identity.

label: field of engineering
definition: The branch of engineering in which a person specializes, indicating their technical expertise and professional focus within the field of engineering.

label: location
definition: The geographic location of an entity, specified as a city and country, indicating where it is situated.

label: CGPA
definition: The numerical representation of overall academic performance in a degree program, calculated as the average of all grade points earned.

label: core courses
definition: The fundamental academic courses completed as part of an educational program, typically reflecting the main subject areas studied by a student.

label: specialized knowledge
definition: The technical or theoretical knowledge areas specifically developed through formal education or training.

label: institution
definition: The educational institution where an individual completed a secondary or pre-university level academic qualification.

label: duration of program
definition: The length of time required to complete a secondary or pre-university educational qualification.

label: performance percentage
definition: The proportion of maximum possible marks obtained by a person in an academic qualification, expressed as a percentage.

label: duration of role
definition: The time period during which an individual occupied a particular job role, indicating when the role began and ended.

label: responsibilities
definition: The primary tasks or duties an individual is accountable for performing in a professional role.

label: achievements
definition: The accomplishments or successes an individual has achieved during their professional experience, reflecting impact or value added in their role.

label: simulation tools
definition: The software applications employed to perform simulations, typically within technical or scientific domains.

label: algorithm
definition: The machine learning or computational method applied in a technical context, typically associated with technical skills or project implementations.

label: tools
definition: The specific software, frameworks, or technologies utilized by a professional to enhance productivity or streamline tasks.

label: hardware platforms
definition: The hardware platforms relation denotes the specific physical computing systems or devices used for the development or deployment of embedded software or applications.

label: location of university
definition: The city or geographic location where the subject attended or was affiliated with a university.

label: duration of degree
definition: The time period during which an educational degree was undertaken, indicating when the study began and ended.

label: location of college
definition: The geographic city where the individual's college for higher secondary education (FSc) is situated.

label: marks percentage in FSc
definition: The numerical percentage of marks obtained by a person in the FSc (Pre-Engineering or Pre-Medical) academic program.

label: country of school
definition: The country in which the individual's matriculation school is located.

label: duration of matriculation
definition: The time period during which an individual was officially enrolled in an educational institution.

label: marks percentage in matriculation
definition: The numerical percentage score attained by a person in their matriculation (secondary school) academic program.

label: current employer
definition: The organization that currently employs the individual.

label: location of employer
definition: The geographic city associated with the organization that currently employs the individual.

label: focus of work
definition:
The primary area or topic of the subject's professional activities.  

**Definition:** The central professional area or subject matter that the person primarily engages with in their work.

label: RL algorithm used
definition: A reinforcement learning algorithm applied by a professional in a project listed on their resume.

label: algorithm for positioning
definition: The algorithm employed to determine or optimize an entity's position within a simulated environment.

label: multi-agent framework name
definition: The name of a system or architecture designed to enable coordination and interaction among multiple autonomous agents.

label: freelance company
definition: The company or organization for which the person provided freelance services.

label: role in freelance
definition: The professional position or function occupied by an individual during a freelance engagement.

label: duration of freelance role
definition: The time period during which an individual performed freelance work, indicating when the engagement began and ended.

label: carbon tracking tool
definition: A software tool designed to quantify and monitor greenhouse gas emissions associated with a project or activity.

label: location of organization
definition: The geographic city associated with the organization linked to a person's professional activity.

label: microcontroller used
definition: A microcontroller used refers to the specific embedded system processor or integrated circuit employed by an individual in a technical project or application.

label: course
definition: A course is an academic subject or sequence of subjects undertaken by a person as part of their educational background.

label: project
definition: A project is a specific initiative or task undertaken by a person, typically reflecting their professional work or developmental efforts.

label: course name
definition: The academic course title formally completed by an individual as part of their educational background.

label: presentation title
definition: A presentation title is the name given to a formal talk or seminar that the person has delivered.

label: university
definition: The educational institution at which the person is currently enrolled as a student.

label: start date
definition: The date marking the beginning of an individual's involvement in a role, position, or educational program.

label: end date
definition: The date marking the conclusion of a subject's involvement in a role, program, or position.

label: percentage of marks
definition: The proportion of total academic marks obtained by a person in an educational program, expressed as a percentage.

label: current status
definition: The current professional or project-related situation the individual is engaged in at the present time.

label: multi-agent coordination framework
definition: A collaborative system or architecture designed to enable coordination among multiple autonomous agents, typically developed or implemented by an individual in a technical or research capacity.

label: full name
definition: The complete name of the individual associated with the resume document.

label: courses taken
definition: A relation indicating the academic courses successfully completed by an individual as part of their educational training.

label: current status of role
definition: A relation indicating whether a professional role is currently active or has been concluded, typically applied to employment or position entities.

label: name of FSc program
definition: The name of the intermediate (FSc) program completed by an individual, indicating their secondary-level academic specialization.

label: marks achieved in FSc
definition: The numerical score or grade attained by a person in the FSc (Intermediate) academic program.

label: name of matriculation program
definition: The specific title or designation of the academic matriculation program successfully completed by the individual.

label: marks achieved in matriculation
definition: The academic scores attained by a person during their matriculation-level education.

label: simulation engineered
definition: A simulation engineered by a person refers to a computational model or system designed and implemented by an individual to replicate real or hypothetical processes.

label: algorithms implemented
definition: The set of computational algorithms that a person has developed, applied, or integrated into a project or system.

label: status of project
definition: The current developmental stage or progress level of a project or framework.
